batches.summary: Checkpointed the mixed implementation and baseline.
Detached the legacy normal plugin from the roundtable compatibility relay.
Removed roundtable state, UI, messages, bridge, and build entry from the source plugin.
Extracted shared path identity, locking, and atomic file APIs.
Centralized permissions, transactions, registry, and filesystem tools in local-core.
Packaged the independent normal plugin product.
Packaged the standalone roundtable app and launchers.
Separated runtime ownership and bounded launcher latency.
Added static boundary checks and root aggregation suites.
Recorded final automated evidence and the explicit manual live-acceptance boundary.
